disclaimer: Researcher-mode output. Pairs are CANDIDATES only, not asserted matches. A high-confidence pair still requires human verification before any public claim is made that a specific dispatch led to a specific arrest. JCStream does not publish these joins on its own pages. Joining keys are inmate_number (vs current.json) and cfs_row_index (vs the cfs_recent.json or cfs_pdi_recent.json feed identified by cfs_source). Confidence weights: 50% temporal proximity within a +/- 60 minute window, 50% textual overlap between the charge description and the CFS row's disposition/incident-type fields.
